subject: GRB 990510: Final BeppoSAX-WFC Coordinates
body:
Luigi Piro, on behalf of the BeppoSAX team, report:

A GRB (GRB 990510) was detected by the GRBM and WFC of BeppoSAX
on May 10, around 8:49 U.T. 

Final coordinates from WFC are:
R.A.(2000)=204.5248 
DEC(2000)=-80.4925
The error radius is 3'. 

A follow-on with NFI is being done.
